title: C-man
description: Just a little mod to add certain features to my friend's minecraft server.
body:
Currently being developed, this mod is made to add a couple random things to minecraft. 
Additions inclue, but are not limited to; Glowing Soup (in progress), Galvanized square steel (in progress), steel (in progress), zinc (in progress), galvanization (in progress), galvanized steel (in progress), eco friendly wood vaneers (in progress), an aunt villager proffession to borrow screws from (in progress), non-eco freindly wood vaneers (in progress), and more that will take me a while to list here.

If you'd like to see all of the fully added features you can check the changelog where I'll keep a more accurate account of what is actually implemented and what isn't.
